ec2.ec2fleet.fleetlaunchtemplatespecific:
Specifies the launch template to be used by the EC2 Fleet for configuring Amazon EC2 instances.

You must specify the following:
+ The ID or the name of the launch template, but not both.
+ The version of the launch template.

`FleetLaunchTemplateSpecificationRequest` is a property of the [ FleetLaunchTemplateConfigRequest](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ec2-ec2fleet-fleetlaunchtemplateconfigrequest.html) property type.

For information about creating a launch template, see [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-ec2-launchtemplate.html) and [Create a launch template](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/ec2-launch-templates.html

ec2.ec2fleet.fleetlaunchtemplatespecific.Description: The ID of the launch template.  You must specify the `LaunchTemplateId` or the `LaunchTemplateName`, but not both.
The name of the launch template.  You must specify the `LaunchTemplateName` or the `LaunchTemplateId`, but not both.

The launch template version number, `$Latest`, or `$Default`. You must specify a value, otherwise the request fails.  If the value is `$Latest`, Amazon EC2 uses the latest version of the launch template.  If the value is `$Default`, Amazon EC2 uses the default version of the launch template.
